---
title: "Teaching"
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

###  University Teaching 

```{r , layout="l-body-outset"}
library(tidyverse)

units <- read_csv("data/teaching.csv")


x<- knitr::kable(units[1:5, ],
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = 'List of Postgraduate Teachning at QUT - (CS60) Graduate Diploma in Medical Ultrasound, (CS61) Graduate Diploma in Cardiac Ultrasound')
x

```

### Invited Talks / Presentations

```{r}

```
